articles.title: Arbitrum Doesn’t Have a Token, But You Can Still Long It. Here’s How
articles.description: GMX and Dopex, two of the top protocols on Arbitrum, may provide opportunities for traders to gain exposure to the Layer 2 solution while waiting for any native token it may one day release. articles.title: FIFA launches digital World Cup collectibles project on Algorand
articles.description: The collection of notable soccer moments and imagery comes four months after FIFA's partnership with Algorand in May of this year.

articles.title: FIFA All Set To Launch An NFT Collection Featuring Some Of The Greatest Moments Of The Tournament’s History
articles.description: FIFA is set to launch an NFT collection featuring some of the most iconic moments of the tournament’s history The NFT collection will be launched on the Algorand blockchain in late September. articles.description: A popular analyst is updating his price targets for a trio of crypto assets as the markets conclude a rocky week of trading.
